findings.line: The first she had felt that was not stolen from a galley stove or another body standing too close.
findings.reason: Pattern 3 source-swap; the sentence defines the heat by rejecting prior sources instead of naming the present one directly.
findings.suggestedFix: The first true heat since the galley stove and bodies pressed close.

findings.line: Not one thing. A repeating breath.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the first fragment is dead scaffolding before the real description.
findings.suggestedFix: A repeating breath.

findings.line: Fire would not break it. Fire changed things from the inside.
findings.deletionTest: Fire changed things from the inside.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 preamble negation; the first sentence stages a false route before the operative claim.
findings.suggestedFix: Fire changed things from the inside.

findings.line: Not a break point. The turn.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the negated setup can be cut without losing the usable term.
findings.suggestedFix: The turn.

findings.line: Not to melt it. To force the binding to answer to something else.
findings.deletionTest: To force the binding to answer to something else.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the usable intention is in the second fragment and the negated setup is expendable.
findings.suggestedFix: To change the binding from the inside.

findings.line: Not an insult. Ship measure.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the line lands cleanly once the negated preface is removed.
findings.suggestedFix: Ship measure.

findings.line: Short this time. As though the trouble were discipline and not the bakery smell rising off her skin.
findings.deletionTest: Short this time. As though the trouble were the bakery smell rising off her skin.
findings.reason: Pattern 1 direct contrast pivot; the sentence names the real problem only after rejecting a fake one.
findings.suggestedFix: Short this time. As though the bakery smell rising off her skin were the trouble.

findings.line: He was no longer arriving. He was settled.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 preamble negation; the first clause only backs away from the direct state named in the second.
findings.suggestedFix: He had already settled.

findings.line: Not this.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the sentence supplies only a negated setup and withholds the real noun.
findings.suggestedFix: Something smaller.

findings.line: Baelgun's eyes went over them once: elf commander, half-spent mage, Cyndia with her bow still in hand, three rangers crusted in cave frost and old blood.
findings.subject: Baelgun's eyes
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part agency; Baelgun is the one surveying the formation.
findings.suggestedFix: Baelgun looked them over once: elf commander, half-spent mage, Cyndia with her bow still in hand, three rangers crusted in cave frost and old blood.

findings.line: Then the wind got under her hood and reminded her what waited farther south.
findings.subject: the wind
findings.realAgent: the gust plus Jaina's own recollection
findings.reason: The sentence gives a gust the cognitive work of memory instead of letting Jaina remember.
findings.suggestedFix: Then the wind got under her hood, and she remembered what waited farther south.

findings.line: The pause where the whole thing changed its mind.
findings.subject: the whole thing
findings.reason: Pattern 5 object agency; the mechanism is treated like it is making a decision.
findings.suggestedFix: The pause where the rhythm turned.

findings.line: That lie had not survived Northrend.
findings.subject: That lie
findings.realAgent: the evidence and pressure of Northrend
findings.reason: The sentence makes the lie behave like a living thing instead of naming that the experience killed it.
findings.suggestedFix: By Northrend, the lie was dead.

findings.line: When the pull in Frostmourne's field lined up cleanly with the rhythm of her steps, the answer opened one shade farther.
findings.subject: the answer
findings.reason: Pattern 5 object agency; the answer is made to act instead of Jaina understanding more.
findings.suggestedFix: When the pull in Frostmourne's field lined up cleanly with the rhythm of her steps, Jaina understood one shade more.

findings.line: Dagny's eyes slid to Sylvanas.
findings.subject: Dagny's eyes
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part agency; Dagny is the one looking at Sylvanas.
findings.suggestedFix: Dagny looked at Sylvanas.

findings.line: "Come fast," Antonidas said. "That is all the city will still allow you."
findings.subject: the city
findings.realAgent: the palace authorities and the city's political constraints
findings.reason: Pattern 5 object agency; the city is assigned the permission structure that belongs to people and institutions.
findings.suggestedFix: "Come fast," Antonidas said. "That is all the palace authorities will still permit."

findings.line: The sea offered no answer.
findings.subject: The sea
findings.realAgent: Jaina's failed search for clarity during the crossing
findings.reason: Pattern 2 infrastructure asking/answering; the sea is made to participate in the reasoning instead of Jaina failing to solve it there.
findings.suggestedFix: She found no answer in the sea.

findings.line: That was the only kindness the crossing gave her.
findings.subject: the crossing
findings.realAgent: the time Jaina got during the crossing
findings.reason: Pattern 5 object agency; the voyage is made to bestow kindness instead of the passage merely buying time.
findings.suggestedFix: That was the only good thing she got from the crossing.

findings.line: The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the body keeping count under everything else presented its bill.
findings.subject: the body keeping count under everything else
findings.reason: Pattern 5 object agency; the body is personified as an accountant collecting payment.
findings.suggestedFix: The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the cost under everything else came due.

findings.line: Dragonblight had at least possessed the decency to announce itself as murder-country.
findings.subject: Dragonblight
findings.verb: possessed the decency to announce itself
findings.reason: The geography is given judgment and self-announcing intent instead of the narration naming what made it legibly deadly.
findings.suggestedFix: Dragonblight had at least looked like murder-country from the first mile.

findings.line: Silence sat badly in the mouth.
findings.subject: Silence
findings.realAgent: Sylvanas enduring the act of staying silent
findings.reason: Pattern 7 active absence; silence is made to apply pressure instead of Sylvanas feeling the strain of keeping it.
findings.suggestedFix: Keeping silent sat badly in her mouth.

findings.line: "The court hears only what confirms the prince's return as triumph."
findings.subject: The court
findings.realAgent: the courtiers still committed to the triumph narrative
findings.reason: Pattern 4 institutional self-deception; the institution is given the selective cognition that belongs to specific people inside it.
findings.suggestedFix: "Only confirming reports reach the courtiers still calling it triumph."

findings.line: Antonidas's eyes shifted a fraction, hearing the older wound under the new question.
findings.subject: Antonidas's eyes
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part agency; Antonidas is the one reacting to the question.
findings.suggestedFix: Antonidas looked aside a fraction, hearing the older wound under the new question.

findings.line: The ordinary machinery of a palace breathing on the far side of murder.
findings.subject: The ordinary machinery of a palace
findings.realAgent: the kitchens, servants, and ongoing palace work
findings.reason: The palace infrastructure is given organic behavior instead of the prose naming the ordinary work continuing around them.
findings.suggestedFix: On the far side of murder, kitchens and servants still worked.

findings.line: The service passage swallowed them whole.
findings.subject: The service passage
findings.reason: Pattern 6 scenery/architecture agency; the corridor is made to act on them instead of them disappearing into it.
findings.suggestedFix: They vanished into the service passage.

audits.cleanReason: Counted all seven tic families. There are no corner-of-mouth micro-expression repeats, no marked overload, tightened/eased stays under cap, eye/gaze beats stay within the four-beat ceiling, emotional weight metaphors do not cluster, and performance-tag avoidance of said does not exceed the limit.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A found 25 mild sentence-level issues: 9 negation-addiction hits and 16 intent-smear hits. recurring-prose-tics.md was clean, but the mild-only count is still well above the pass threshold of 3.
